description_long: This is a grand piano with a sleek black exterior and a partially open lid, revealing the intricate wooden soundboard and internal string mechanism. The piano features a full-sized keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and three gold-tipped pedals at the base. The legs are sturdy and fitted with gold casters, allowing for limited mobility. The interior showcases a polished wood finish, contrasting with the glossy black outer shell. The lid is propped open with a support stick, typical of concert grand pianos, and the overall build is robust and elegant. No visible brand or logo is present on the exterior.
description: A glossy black grand piano with a partially open lid, full keyboard, and gold-accented pedals and casters. The interior features polished wood and visible string mechanisms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, three gold-tipped pedals, and the open lid revealing the wooden interior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the piano, the open lid, and the detailed wooden soundboard and string area.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the curved body, the underside of the open lid, and the exposed wooden interior.
description_view_3: Back view showing the closed rear of the piano, the full expanse of the lid, and the supporting legs.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard 88-key layout with alternating white and black keys, no missing or non-standard keys visible.
